DIRECTORY STRUCTURE
===================
✅ finsight/
   ✅ Root files (5):
      ✅ app.py                          Main entry point
      ✅ requirements.txt                9 dependencies
      ✅ README.md                       Project overview
      ✅ QUICKSTART.md                   Setup guide (45 min)
      ✅ .gitignore                      Git exclusion rules

   ✅ .streamlit/ (2):
      ✅ config.toml                     UI theme config
      ✅ secrets.example.toml            Template for credentials

   ✅ lib/ - Business Logic (5):
      ✅ db.py                           Supabase + PostgreSQL
      ✅ extrator.py                     Claude AI extraction
      ✅ kpis.py                         KPI calculations (20+)
      ✅ alertas.py                      Alert rules (8-10)
      ✅ utils.py                        Formatting helpers

   ✅ pages/ - Multi-Page App (4):
      ✅ 1_Dashboard.py                  📈 Main dashboard
      ✅ 2_Importar.py                   📄 Upload & extract
      ✅ 3_Metas.py                      🎯 Target setting
      ✅ 4_Historico.py                  🗂️ Upload history

   ✅ components/ - UI Components (4):
      ✅ kpi_cards.py                    6 KPI metric cards
      ✅ tabela_resumo.py                12-month table
      ✅ grafico_evolucao.py             Trend chart (Plotly)
      ✅ alertas_feed.py                 Alert display

   ✅ sql/ - Database (2):
      ✅ schema.sql                      8 tables + 5 indexes
      ✅ seed.py                         12-month sample data

   ✅ Documentation (3):
      ✅ IMPLEMENTATION_SUMMARY.md       Complete spec
      ✅ README.md                       Features & tech stack
      ✅ QUICKSTART.md                   Step-by-step guide

FEATURES IMPLEMENTED
====================

Dashboard (Page 1):
  ✅ Year/month selector
  ✅ KPI cards (6 metrics)
  ✅ 12-month comparison table
  ✅ Plotly trend chart
  ✅ Alert feed

Document Import (Page 2):
  ✅ PDF/XLSX file uploader
  ✅ Claude AI extraction
  ✅ Real-time processing
  ✅ Database persistence
  ✅ Success feedback

Target Management (Page 3):
  ✅ Input form (faturamento, despesas, resultado)
  ✅ Auto-calculated margem
  ✅ Database UPSERT

Upload History (Page 4):
  ✅ Sortable data table
  ✅ Status indicators
  ✅ Confidence scores

Core Modules:
  ✅ Database: Supabase connection pooling
  ✅ Extraction: Claude API + PDF/XLSX parsing
  ✅ KPIs: 20+ financial metrics
  ✅ Alerts: 8 severity-based rules
  ✅ Utils: BRL formatting, emoji icons

Database:
  ✅ 8 normalized tables
  ✅ Foreign key relationships
  ✅ 5 performance indexes
  ✅ Unique constraints
  ✅ Timestamp audit trails

DEPLOYMENT READY
================
✅ No hardcoded credentials
✅ .gitignore prevents secrets leaks
✅ requirements.txt locked to versions
✅ README + guides provided
✅ Local testing instructions included
✅ GitHub + Streamlit Cloud deployment path defined

COST ESTIMATE
=============
Streamlit Cloud:   $0   (free tier)
Supabase:          $0-5 (free then $25+/mo at scale)
Claude API:        $1-3 (per 10 documents/month)
────────────────────────────────────
Total (1st month): $0   (all free tiers)
Total (ongoing):   $5-30/month (depending on usage)

NEXT USER STEPS (45 minutes to cloud deployment)
================================================
1. Create Supabase account (free)
   - Project region: South America (São Paulo)
   - Get DB URL + API keys

2. Create Claude API key (free, usage-based)
   - Go to console.anthropic.com
   - Set $5/mo budget cap (recommended)

3. Configure local secrets
   - Copy .streamlit/secrets.example.toml → secrets.toml
   - Fill 4 variables from steps 1-2

4. Install dependencies
   - pip install -r requirements.txt

5. Setup database
   - Supabase SQL Editor → execute sql/schema.sql

6. Populate data
   - python sql/seed.py

7. Test locally
   - streamlit run app.py → verify all 4 pages load

8. Deploy to cloud
   - git init && git push to GitHub (public)
   - streamlit.io → New app → add secrets → Deploy

9. Test cloud app
   - Open https://YOUR_APP.streamlit.app
   - Try document upload
   - Verify Claude extraction works

EXPECTED RESULTS
================
✅ Dashboard loads with 12 months of data
✅ KPI cards show correct calculations
✅ Table shows meta vs actual comparisons
✅ Chart shows 12-month trend
✅ Alerts auto-generated based on thresholds
✅ File upload triggers Claude extraction
✅ New KPIs appear within 10 seconds
✅ Cloud app updates when GitHub code pushed

PROJECT CONFIGURATION
======================
Python Version:    3.11+ (recommended)
Dependencies:      9 packages (all in requirements.txt)
Database:          PostgreSQL 14+ (via Supabase)
Deployment:        Streamlit Community Cloud (free)
API Keys Needed:   2 (Anthropic + Supabase - both free tier)

SECURITY NOTES
==============
✅ No credentials in code (using st.secrets)
✅ .streamlit/secrets.toml in .gitignore
✅ All SQL queries parameterized (no injection)
✅ Single-tenant design (safe for shared code)
✅ Supabase anon key used (read-only for public)
✅ Database password never exposed

============

Database:    PostgreSQL (via Supabase)
AI:          Claude Sonnet 4.5 (extraction)
Deploy:      Streamlit Community Cloud (auto-scaling)
Storage:     GitHub (code) + Supabase (data)
